'''Tanea''' was the Senior Surveyor onboard the [[Astrogator-class probe ship]] ''[[Astrolabe]]'' employed with the [[Astrographic Survey Institute]] in [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]]. She had nearly three thousand overflights of star systems during her career yet had only set foot on half a dozen worlds. She was [[Death/Legends|killed]] with the rest of the ship's crew when the ''Astrolabe'' was destroyed by the [[Yevetha]] in the leadup to the [[Black Fleet Crisis]].<ref name="BTS" />
